evals.prompt: Write markup for a polite status message that announces a successful form submission.
evals.expected_output: Uses a pre-existing live region with role="status" or aria-live="polite" and avoids assertive announcements for a routine success message.
expectations: The message uses polite live-region behaviour
The live region exists in the DOM before the message is inserted
The announcement is suitable for a routine success state
The message is not unnecessarily interruptive

evals.prompt: Create a live region for search results count updates.
evals.expected_output: Keeps the live region in the DOM on page load and updates it with aria-atomic="true" so the full count message is announced.
expectations: The live region is present before content is inserted
The region uses aria-atomic="true"
The visible count and announced count stay in sync
The message is concise enough to be read quickly

evals.prompt: Write markup for an urgent session expiry warning that needs immediate attention.
evals.expected_output: Uses an assertive live region only for the urgent warning and makes the message short and actionable.
expectations: The warning can interrupt current speech when necessary
The message is urgent enough to justify assertive behaviour
The warning copy tells the user what action to take
The live region is not reused for routine updates

evals.prompt: Build a chat log where each new message should be announced without rereading the whole log.
evals.expected_output: Uses aria-atomic="false" on the log so each added message is announced individually.
expectations: The log announces additions individually
The entire log is not reread on every update
The live region supports incremental updates
The implementation is appropriate for message streams

evals.prompt: Write CSS for a visually hidden live region used only for announcements.
evals.expected_output: Hides the region visually without using display:none and does not add aria-hidden="true".
expectations: The live region remains available to assistive technology
The region is visually hidden using a standard visually-hidden pattern
display:none is not used on the live region
aria-hidden="true" is not applied to the live region
